text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins! I learned in class that a lot
of racers make huge leaps and bounds in
improvement during summer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best preparing for the
Sprinters Stakes too! And, of course, I'll be
keeping a close eye on Sky as well.
